mapper.select: select * from monthly_snapshots where snapshot_month = #{snapshotMonth} order by account_id

select a.id as account_id, a.name, a.institution, a.asset_category, a.investment_type, a.risk_level, s.amount as amount, s.note from monthly_snapshots s join accounts a on a.id = s.account_id where a.active = 1 and s.snapshot_month = #{snapshotMonth} order by a.asset_category, a.investment_type, a.institution, a.name
mapper.insert: insert into monthly_snapshots (account_id, snapshot_month, amount, note) values (#{accountId}, #{snapshotMonth}, #{amount}, #{note}) on duplicate key update amount = values(amount), note = values(note)
mapper.select: select date_format(snapshot_month, '%Y-%m') from monthly_snapshots group by snapshot_month order by snapshot_month

select date_format(s.snapshot_month, '%Y-%m') as month, a.asset_category as name, sum(s.amount) as value from monthly_snapshots s join accounts a on a.id = s.account_id where s.snapshot_month between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} group by s.snapshot_month, a.asset_category order by s.snapshot_month, a.asset_category
